name: demo-app
description: Capacitor showcase app for the egnss-capacitor plugin. HTML + vanilla JS + OpenLayers.

scripts.android: npm run sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo "\nAPK at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk"
scripts.android:install: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew installDebug
scripts.ios: npm run sync && cap open ios
